race.comment: MOVE IT LOU NZ (2) faces a class test but has been working though his grades in good style, winning his last three outings here. Comes into this fresh before but won a trial by a big space last week and has the speed to take advantage of a low draw. Former Kiwi NYMBAL NZ (9) made it two from two since crossing the Tasman when scoring at this circuit and distance last week. Draws on the back row but came from a similar barrier to land the Redcliffe Derby prior so is very hard to knock. YOTTIE (10) draws on the back row but has only gone under by 2m as runner-up in both starts since a spell. Placed in both the NSW Derby and Gold Chalice last campaign and is unbeaten third-up so could be ready to show his best. SOHO CHARMER (8) draws for a trail and brings good from from Menangle, winning fresh before drawing wide and missing by a nose last time. Each way hope as is MAXO MIGHTY (3) who drew on the back row last start but came from wider barriers than this in winning his previous three outings.

Live1.SchedulerNote: *P1 Ladbrokes QLD Constellations Carnival - Prize Money: $26,000
